metadata.title: Bà bầu duyên dáng bên bên hoa mận
metadata.description: Bà bầu duyên dáng bên bên hoa mận tại Mộc Châu

photos.content:
A 9 months pregnant woman posing in an elegant fine-art studio scene. She wears a cream/beige tailored blazer layered over a fitted white maternity dress that gently highlights the baby bump. A black silk ribbon bow tie at the collar. She holds a bouquet of vibrant red flowers. Wearing a wide flat straw hat with black chin straps. Soft natural makeup, gentle expression, graceful posture.
Outdoor prairie landscape with a real white horse walking behind her. Vast grassland, dusty path, gentle breeze, dramatic sky, warm sunset light, long shadows, cinematic composition, luxury fashion editorial style, rich warm tones, ultra photorealistic, natural light photography.
Use the uploaded image as the face reference. Don’t change the face of reference image. Preserve 100% facial identity, exact likeness, facial structure, proportions, skin texture, and expression. No modification, no beautification, no stylization on the face. Only recreate pose, outfit, accessories, lighting, and background.

Add a small handwritten-style watermark that reads ‘Prompt by: anph21’. Use a beautiful cursive font, thin strokes, low opacity, placed at the bottom right. Don’t change the face of reference image
